candidates.query: meal planning is exhausting lang:en -crypto -bitcoin -solana -ethereum -airdrop -giveaway -retweet -repost -follow -grok -election -president -war -killed -shooting -dress -outfit -nails -wedding
candidates.text: Living with fibromyalgia and chronic fatigue syndrome is one of the hardest things I've ever faced. Every day is a battle against constant pain, overwhelming exhaustion that no amount of sleep can fix, and brain fog that makes even simple things feel impossible. Something as small as bathing, making a meal, or spending time with the people I love can leave me completely drained for days. Most people only see me on the days I'm smiling. They don't see the days I can't get out of bed, the tears...

candidates.query: which movie should we watch lang:en -crypto -bitcoin -solana -ethereum -airdrop -giveaway -retweet -repost -follow -grok -election -president -war -killed -shooting -dress -outfit -nails -wedding
candidates.text: Last night, I attended the premiere of Chris Nolan’s new masterpiece The Odyssey, which took place at our AMC Lincoln Square Theatre in New York City. Oh my, my, my what a wild movie. Our theatres are going to be packed as moviegoers flock to see this film. https://t.co/FO8xakvgWn

candidates.query: which game should I play lang:en -crypto -bitcoin -solana -ethereum -airdrop -giveaway -retweet -repost -follow -grok -election -president -war -killed -shooting -dress -outfit -nails -wedding
candidates.text: I bought $INDEX and my investment ended up doing over 33x. I’m not even going to lie, it feels like I’m playing a video game on easy mode. Ever since I decided to focus on making money, I haven’t looked back. Of course I’ve had losses, but by the end of every month I still end up with more than $500k in my account. It wasn’t easy getting here, which is exactly why I appreciate it so much. And the best part is that the members of my channel got the exact same entry as I did.

candidates.text: Good morning sweety pies 😊 Feeling less homicidal this morning, its amazing what a bar of chocolate can do lol 😂 It's yucky looking weather today, and I'm losing pints of blood as we speak, so no gym for me today....need to pick up some paperwork, and invoices, then the day is mine, to do as I please...I'll probably watch a couple movies, boring Wednesday, will be watching the England game tho later, Cmon lads! 👊 How's your hump day going?
